name: Vimium C
keyMappings:
# Unmap all alt-based bindings that conflict with Aerospace
unmap <a-f>
unmap <a-r>
unmap <a-n>
unmap <a-s-r>
unmap <a-s-c>
unmap <a-v>
unmap <a-c>
unmap <a-t>
unmap <a-p>
unmap <a-m>

# Remap unique alt bindings to g-prefixed alternatives
map qf LinkHints.activateWithQueue
map gp togglePinTab
map gm toggleMuteTab
map g/ performAnotherFind
